name: Jessica O'Connell, EMILY's List
subject: That extra step
disclaimer_text: Paid for by EMILY's List [www
body:
| [ ](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c0baa/24c69fd9/a7284e4/18edf59b/3078886429/VEsH/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/donate-to-emily?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=WPEFEV75N_digital_email_20161027_1question_n-all&source=WPEFEV75N_digital_email_20161027_1question_n-all")
---

| | Hi there,

For the last few weeks, I've been encouraging everyone at EMILY's List to ask themselves before they go home: Is there anything else I can do today to help our candidates win?

Today, I want to ask you the same thing.

With so few days left in the election and so many of our races still close, it's taking that extra step that can change the outcome on Election Day.

**[Rush a $3 donation to make sure our candidates have every last bit of support we can give them.](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c0baa/24c69fd9/a7284e4/18edf594/3078886429/VEsE/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20161027_email_1question?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2+-+Rush+a+3+donation+to+make+sure+our+candi&utm_campaign=WPEFEV75N_digital_email_20161027_1question_n-all&source=WPEFEV75N_digital_email_20161027_1question_n-all")**

Nobody wants to wake up the day after Election Day wondering if they could have done more. But when you put in everything you can, you know you left it all on the field, no matter the outcome. And if your candidates win, it makes the victory that much sweeter.

No matter what we wake up to on November 9th -- a new president, a flipped Senate or a Senate still in GOP hands, new faces in the House or the same old extremists -- I want to make sure you have the opportunity to pitch in as much as you can to make a difference.

If we all put a little more into these races, I know it can impact their outcome.

**Pitch in what you can, and let's give this everything we've got before November 8th:**

**[https://secure.emilyslist.org/A-Little-More](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c0baa/24c69fd9/a7284e4/18edf595/3078886429/VEsF/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20161027_email_1question?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=3+-+httpssecureemilyslistorgALittleMore&utm_campaign=WPEFEV75N_digital_email_20161027_1question_n-all&source=WPEFEV75N_digital_email_20161027_1question_n-all")**

Thanks,

Jess O'Connell
Executive Director, EMILY's List

**[](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c0baa/24c69fd9/a7284e4/18edf596/3078886429/VEsC/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20161027_email_1question?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=4&utm_campaign=WPEFEV75N_digital_email_20161027_1question_n-all&source=WPEFEV75N_digital_email_20161027_1question_n-all")**

|
---|---|---
# EMILY's List is a community of over three million members that helps elect pro-choice Democratic women to office.

|

name: Laura Carlson
subject: re: momentum [12 days]
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida
body:
| |
---
| | [](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2e78/738133e4/321de4ef/7f859214/3629163913/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme161027pm2?refcode=pme161027pm2_m&recur_weekly=true&amount=10")
---
| Hey guys - Did you see Patrick's email? We still have to raise **$8,385** by midnight! We can't make it without you -- [**Can you help us keep the momentum going and defeat Marco Rubio?**](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2e78/738133e4/321de4ef/7f859214/3629163913/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme161027pm2?refcode=pme161027pm2_m&recur_weekly=true&amount=10")

\--------------- Forwarded Message ---------------
From: Patrick Murphy
Date: Thu, Oct 27, 2016
Subject: momentum [12 days]

Hey team --

We only have twelve days left. Twelve. We have the momentum on our side in a huge way -- but if we want to come out on top, we have to make each and every single one of them count. This race is going to be decided by a razor thin margin. [**Can you chip in right now?**](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2e78/738133e4/321de4ef/7f859214/3629163913/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme161027pm2?refcode=pme161027pm2_m&recur_weekly=true&amount=10")

We're **tied** with Marco Rubio! We earned the endorsement of SEVEN Florida newspapers -- plus the _New York Times_. I hit the campaign trail with President Obama, and our next president, Hillary Clinton, this week. We've got almost everything we need to win this race, but...

**There 's one major thing missing.** And that's the resources to turn this progress into a win for Democrats in Florida. We're being outspent 4-1 because Rubio has big-money backers like the Koch brothers and the NRA propping him up. To fight back, we need you with us. [**Can you contribute a few dollars to help us come out on top vs Marco Rubio and turn the Senate blue?**](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2e78/738133e4/321de4ef/7f859214/3629163913/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme161027pm2?refcode=pme161027pm2_m&recur_weekly=true&amount=10")

Thanks,
Patrick

|
Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida.com](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2e78/738133e4/321de4ef/7f859215/3629163913/VEsD/ "http://murphyforflorida.com") This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)
[Click here](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2e78/738133e4/321de4ef/7f859216/3629163913/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "http://murphyforflorida.com/subscriptions/?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com") to unsubscribe

name: Aisling Kerins
subject: Compare and contrast
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jay Inslee for Washington
body:
Voters deserve to know the difference. [](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=OTc3MjU4NgS2&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTAyMjE4OTUyMQS2&mt=1&rt=0)
| Dear Friend, I have an urgent request -- and I promise to make it quick. [**We need to give our GOTV organizing a boost through Election Day. Can you donate $5 (or more) to our Ballot Completion Project right now?**](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=OTc3MjU4NgS2&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTAyMjE4OTUyMQS2&mt=1&rt=0) Republicans are on the attack. They ignore the over 250,000 jobs created across the state these past four years, and question our economic growth under Jay's leadership. They say Jay's too focused on fighting climate change -- as though creating a nation-leading clean energy economy hasn't been a huge boon for our state. And they say our public infrastructure is in trouble, disregarding the $16 billion dollar, bipartisan transportation package Jay fought for and won. That's okay; Jay can take it because he knows his leadership is creating a stronger economy and better future for Washington families. And he knows that with no solutions to offer, all the GOP can do is take potshots at his record and his vision. **It 's time to hold Washington Republicans like Bill Bryant accountable for refusing to take action to stop climate change, and for putting outrageous profit margins for the millionaire-class ahead of economic fairness for workers.** Your support means we can fight back the right way: by mobilizing our communities to vote up and down the ballot. **We 're still $8,721 behind our Ballot Completion Fund goal -** [**Can you contribute to our GOTV effort immediately?**](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=OTc3MjU4NgS2&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTAyMjE4OTUyMQS2&mt=1&rt=0) Thanks for helping us get the word out, Aisling Kerins
Campaign Director | [**CONTRIBUTE »**](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=OTc3MjU4NgS2&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTAyMjE4OTUyMQS2&mt=1&rt=0)
---

| | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [Click here to unsubscribe](http://www.jayinslee.com/unsubscribe?m=9772586&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&j=MTAyMjE4OTUyMQS2&l=5611360&e=dpwillis67@gmail.com).

Contributions or gifts to Jay Inslee for Washington are not tax deductible.
---

PO Box 21067
Seattle, WA 98111

name: Nina Turner, OurRevolution.com
subject: 📞 Let's get on the phone
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION
body:
#
Sisters and Brothers,
We will win progressive power by calling people who supported Bernie Sanders and asking them to vote for progressive candidates we've endorsed as part of our political revolution.
We've improved the calling tools from Bernie's campaign. We have shifts to sign up for that will help turn out the vote for more than 100 candidates and ballot initiatives. We have voters loaded up to call.
**We just need you.[Can you sign up for a GOTV calling shift to contact Bernie voters for our candidates?](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/call-team-rsvp?source=em161027 "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/call-team-rsvp?source=em161027")**
[SIGN UP FOR A
CALLING SHIFT](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/call-team-rsvp?source=em161027 "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/call-team-rsvp?source=em161027")
Calling voters is one of the most important things that you can do for our political revolution.
**If you can't call, can you help us another way?** [**Chip in to help some of our local candidates fund their campaigns in these final days.**](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/local-power?refcode=em161027-org-email "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/local-power?refcode=em161027-org-email")
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/local-power?refcode=em161027-org-email "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/local-power?refcode=em161027-org-email")**
Thank you for all you do.
In solidarity,
Nina Turner
Board Member
Our Revolution

PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION
603 2ND ST, NE
WASHINGTON, DC, 20002

Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee. Our Revolution is a 501(c)(4) organization. Donations to Our Revolution are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. All donations are made to support Our Revolution's general mission and are not designated for any specific activity.
603 2nd St NE, Washington, DC 20002

We can't rely on the biased media: That's why we must immediately help set the record straight about the Democrats' attacks. name: My Faith Votes
subject: LIVE w/ Laura Ingraham
body:
A Conversation with Laura Ingraham | [View this email in your browser.](http://email.bencarson.com/p/vWFL3HCuNp)
---|---

[](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/38413380:WFL3HCuNp:m:1:876315805:D56FB5F55B1870EB7CE08BA19E1F7D13:r)
---
**
****My Faith Votes**
presents
[My Faith Matters LIVE: A Conversation with Laura Ingraham ](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/38413380:WFL3HCuNp:m:1:876315805:D56FB5F55B1870EB7CE08BA19E1F7D13:r)
**Host:** Megan West
**Date:** NOV 3RD
**Time:** 2PM (ET) / 11AM (PT)
_**" When did atheists become so evangelical? I mean, if you don't believe something to be true, wouldn't you just ignore it? That's certainly what I do."**_ \- Laura Ingraham

Get ready for a no-nonsense [interactive call](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/38413380:WFL3HCuNp:m:1:876315805:D56FB5F55B1870EB7CE08BA19E1F7D13:r) or watch the live video stream at [MyFaithVotes.org](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/38413380:WFL3HCuNp:m:1:876315805:D56FB5F55B1870EB7CE08BA19E1F7D13:r) or [Facebook Live](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/38413381:WFL3HCuNp:m:1:876315805:D56FB5F55B1870EB7CE08BA19E1F7D13:r) with Laura Ingraham host of "The Laura Ingraham Show". She is a long-time Fox News contributor and the author of several New York Times bestselling books, including "Power to the People," "Shut Up & Sing," and "The Obama Diaries." In her previous life, she was a litigator, a Supreme Court law clerk, and White House staffer and speechwriter. A mother of three young children, she is a passionate supporter of both domestic and international adoption.

As the most listened to woman in America, we want to know Laura's perspective on what women of faith are looking for in this election, and how that lines up with what we hear in the media. We'll also explore the importance of the family to the culture of America, and we'll get her thoughts on how faith and public policy are playing a role in support of the family.

**You 've got questions, Laura has answers, and there will be plenty of** opportunity in the live, interactive, Q&A session.

This My Faith Matters LIVE Event is scheduled for **Thursday, November 3rd at 2PM (ET) / 11AM (PT),** and will be one you will not want to miss.

[](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/38413380:WFL3HCuNp:m:1:876315805:D56FB5F55B1870EB7CE08BA19E1F7D13:r)
My Faith Votes exists to inspire and motivate Jesus followers to vote. We are a non-partisan movement of the Church in America.
**My Faith Votes******
presents

**Date:** NOV 3RD

name: Greg Gianforte
subject: Toss up
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greg for Montana, PO
body:
Greg for Montana

The momentum is shifting

Friend,

As of today, this race is
officially a "Toss up"! Governing Magazine just reported it has
shifted the Montana Governor's race from "Lean D" to "Toss up".

This, on the heels of a Mason
Dixon poll that showed the race "too close to call."

And we know why. Our vision is
one of more prosperity in Montana - a Montana where our kids
don't have to leave to find good jobs, we can educate them for
the jobs of the future, and we will restore accountability to
state government.

We can win this.

Help us take "Toss up" to "Lean
R"- send your $15, $25, $50 or $100 today!

Thank you,

Greg

Paid for by Greg for Montana, PO
Box 1557, Helena, MT, 59624, Republican

subject: RE: Memo
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J
body:
Prepared by my campaign manager. Please read to see our path forward. |

Friend, I want to share this important memo prepared by my campaign manager, Kellyanne, on where we currently stand in the race for the White House and what we must do to lock in a win. If you don’t read the entire memo below, I’ve highlighted key points that you NEED to know. After reading the memo, please consider making a contribution of $100, $65, $50, $35, $15, or $5 to help us stay on track to win just 11 days from today. BEFORE donating, you’ll also be able to indicate your preference for the state we invest your contribution in. TO: dpwillis67@gmail.com FROM: Kellyanne Conway, Campaign Manager RE: Donald Trump’s Path to 270 Electoral Votes ________________________________________ Donald Trump must reach 270 electoral votes to win the presidency. We’ve outlined a map to show where we currently stand as well as the possible paths forward to win. While we are not taking any state for granted, those colored red are states that we can safely assume will vote for Donald Trump. Blue states favor Hillary. Blank states are too close to call. Over the past month, polls have shown us winning Iowa, Ohio, Maine, Florida, Nevada, and North Carolina. If we maintain our leads in those six states, we can reliably claim 266 electoral votes. Hillary can claim 193. But we’d still have 4 electoral votes to go. Polls show us close in New Hampshire, Colorado, and Pennsylvania. Winning just any one of those states would lead us to victory. We are currently executing a highly costly early voting push and get-out-the-vote operation to ensure identified Trump supporters make it to the polls before Election Day. We are also planning a $140 million-dollar ad blitz in battleground states to lead us to victory. Friend: with just 11 days left, we have a few paths to win. But we’ll need your continued support. Because you’ve been such a critical supporter, you’ll also be able to share your preference on which state we should invest your contribution in. Please make a contribution of $100, $65, $50, $35, $15, or $5 to help us stay on track to win just 11 days from today. Thank you, Donald J. Trump
CONTRIBUTE $100

Contributions to the Trump Make America Great Again Committee are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

name: Steve Bullock
subject: Sincerely
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Steve Bullock - Democrat, P
body:
**_FROM THE DESK OF STEVE BULLOCK_**
10/28/16

Friend,

From me, Lisa and our entire team, I wanted to say a sincere _thank you_ for being a part of this.

We've faced an onslaught of $5 million+ in self-funding from Greg Gianforte -- so every single grassroots donation we've received has made a huge difference.

I'm going to be working as hard as I possibly can in these remaining few days. The fact that we just blew past our most important grassroots fundraising goal of the entire campaign -- especially amid all this negativity -- means a lot to me.

Thanks for everything,

Steve

name: Donald J. Trump
subject: Finish this fight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J
body:
This is how I'm showing my commitment to our movement. |
* * *
Please find a special message from one of our advertisers, Trump Make America Great Again Committee.
* * *
---
[](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/38420316:scFzQYuN6:m:1:876315805:E99672171D7E88AF87BCE091776C639D:r)
Peter,

_**We are down to the last 4 days of October -- and Election Day is now just 11 days away.**_

This is our _last_ End of Month Fundraising Deadline -- and obviously the most important of the campaign -- because we're running out of time to secure resources that can actually be put into the fight before November 8th.

Peter, our tremendous movement to Make America Great Again needs to make one more huge push to ensure our final days' voter outreach and all-important Get-Out-the Vote ground game are absolutely as effective as possible -- **[and I need you to be at the center of that push NOW.](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/38420316:scFzQYuN6:m:1:876315805:E99672171D7E88AF87BCE091776C639D:r)
**
We must make tremendous progress by midnight October 31st -- that's why I'm calling for a huge $20 Million October End of Month Fundraising Drive today, [**and asking you to make an immediate contribution of $250, $100, $50, $25 or even $5 to help us make it happen.**](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/38420316:scFzQYuN6:m:1:876315805:E99672171D7E88AF87BCE091776C639D:r)

**[CONTRIBUTE $250 NOW](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/38420317:scFzQYuN6:m:1:876315805:E99672171D7E88AF87BCE091776C639D:r)**
**[CONTRIBUTE $100 NOW](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/38420318:scFzQYuN6:m:1:876315805:E99672171D7E88AF87BCE091776C639D:r)**
**[CONTRIBUTE $50 NOW](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/38420319:scFzQYuN6:m:1:876315805:E99672171D7E88AF87BCE091776C639D:r)**
**[CONTRIBUTE $25 NOW](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/38420320:scFzQYuN6:m:1:876315805:E99672171D7E88AF87BCE091776C639D:r)**
**[CONTRIBUTE OTHER AMOUNT](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/38420316:scFzQYuN6:m:1:876315805:E99672171D7E88AF87BCE091776C639D:r)**
Peter, I'll even go a step further -- __I 'll put in $10 million of my own funds__ \-- [**so I 'm asking patriotic Americans to step up and help Team Trump with a contribution at this critical time!**](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/38420316:scFzQYuN6:m:1:876315805:E99672171D7E88AF87BCE091776C639D:r)

Crooked Hillary and her corrupt media cheerleaders are going to attack me with more ferocity than ever this last week and a half -- and we can't let their negativity and lies eat into Trump supporter turnout \-- we've got to fight back.

So please stand with me now in this fight to take our country back -- [**make an immediate "4 Days -- $10 Million" October End of Month contribution today!**](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/38420316:scFzQYuN6:m:1:876315805:E99672171D7E88AF87BCE091776C639D:r)

Sincerely,

Donald J. Trump

P.S. Peter, we can't look back and wish we'd done more -- we must stay focused and finish this fight with a final push that will knock Crooked Hillary out and bring us a tremendous, historic victory. We've only got four days to raise $10 million -- [**will you help with your urgent $20 Million October End of Month gift now?**](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/38420316:scFzQYuN6:m:1:876315805:E99672171D7E88AF87BCE091776C639D:r)
**[CONTRIBUTE NOW](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/38420316:scFzQYuN6:m:1:876315805:E99672171D7E88AF87BCE091776C639D:r)** | Contributions to the Trump Make America Great Again Committee are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

**End-of-month deadline: MONDAY. Goal: $60,000.
[Chip in $5 (gifts matched) >>](https://bayh.bsd.net/page/m/32a505cc/7be36b49/1e01383d/78f9d8a2/1650123997/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/eb-finaleom?refcode=20161028nd&amount=10")** Friend -- I'm checking in from one of our field offices, where staff and volunteers are working their hearts out to elect Evan.

Because of your contributions, we've been able to launch _twenty_ of these field offices across Indiana, which will be key to our **all-counties, all-hands-on-deck** Get Out The Vote effort.

Paul emailed yesterday to tell you about the big picture. I'm here to tell you how things are going on the ground. Hoosiers are excited about Evan's campaign -- but they've also been seeing all the negative attack ads (paid for by millions of dollars in dark money).

**Here 's the truth: With the race as tight as it is, we can't afford to let up for a single second. [That's why I'm asking you to make a $5 donation before Monday's end-of-month deadline.](https://bayh.bsd.net/page/m/32a505cc/7be36b49/1e01383d/78f9d8a2/1650123997/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/eb-finaleom?refcode=20161028nd&amount=10")** Your gift will be MATCHED, which means it'll go twice as far toward electing Evan and bringing common-sense leadership to Indiana. body:
What I’m doing for our supporters |

Friend, I want to show you this message from one of our strongest donors:
I have never donated to any presidential campaign. I only work part time so that I can be home for my daughter and be off when she needs me so I can only donate a small amount but I believe enough in Mr. Trump's policies that I have sacrificed a few things just to be able to donate the little that I could. -Vonnie T., a hard-working patriot from Florida Vonnie might think she only gave “a little.” But her $6 contribution was a BIG sacrifice for our country. Thanks to Vonnie and millions of patriots just like her, we’ve collectively raised hundreds of millions of dollars and set an all-time record for Republican fundraising. And her tremendous sacrifice is what inspired me to do something HUGE! I’m putting in an UNPRECEDENTED TEN MILLION DOLLARS TO OUR CAMPAIGN. But I need YOU to join me before our end-of-month deadline. Please make a contribution toward our FINAL goal. CONTRIBUTE $6 CONTRIBUTE $25 CONTRIBUTE $50 CONTRIBUTE $100 CONTRIBUTE $200 CONTRIBUTE OTHER AMOUNT Hillary might have the special interests and millionaire lobbyists on her side, but we have something far more powerful: THE AMERICAN PEOPLE. We have millions of hard-working patriotic Americans chipping in whatever they can to save our country. I’m truly proud of that. And today I want to say thanks to all of our supporters by putting in an unprecedented TEN MILLION DOLLARS to this campaign. Your contribution today will help fund our FINAL ad blitz and get-out-the-vote ground game in battleground states that will determine the outcome of this historic election. Please make a contribution toward our FINAL end-of-month goal. Thank you and God bless you, Donald J. Trump CONTRIBUTE $100

subject: Elizabeth Warren said:
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
body:

---
**" The fate of the Senate hangs in the balance, and may all hinge on Pennsylvania.
We need to make sure our friend Katie McGinty wins this race."**
_- Elizabeth Warren_ Look, we couldn't say it better than Senator Warren just did a few days ago. This Senate race is _CRUCIAL_ -- not just to elect working families a champion for Pennsylvania, but to _swing the balance of the entire Senate (and the Supreme Court!)_.

Nate Silver's team agrees, **reporting that Pennsylvania is THE "tipping point state" for Senate control.**

**In a race as close as this one, EVERY donation makes a difference.** [**PLEASE pitch in $5 or more before our end-of-month deadline and your gift will be TRIPLE-MATCHED >>**](https://act.myngp.com/el/-528091990257041408/-6752839777986281472?refcode=e20161028.2&refcode2=e20161028.2nd&amount=25)

Want Katie in the Senate working with Senator Warren to rein in big banks?
**[Chip in (3x match)>>](https://act.myngp.com/el/-528091990257041408/-6752839777986281472?refcode=e20161028.2&refcode2=e20161028.2nd&amount=25)**
Want Katie in the Senate fighting for policies that boost the middle class, like increasing the minimum wage and equal pay for equal work?
**[Chip in (3x match)>>](https://act.myngp.com/el/-528091990257041408/-6752839777986281472?refcode=e20161028.2&refcode2=e20161028.2nd&amount=25)**
Want Katie in the Senate confirming Supreme Court justices who will represent all Americans and get dark money out of our political system?
**[Chip in (3x match)>>](https://act.myngp.com/el/-528091990257041408/-6752839777986281472?refcode=e20161028.2&refcode2=e20161028.2nd&amount=25)**
**This race is neck-and-neck, but this is your chance to leave an out-of-sized impact. Don 't wait:**

[**www.katiemcginty.com/triple-match**](https://act.myngp.com/el/-528091990257041408/-6752839777986281472?refcode=e20161028.2&refcode2=e20161028.2nd&amount=25)

Time is running out -

Team Katie

| *** A note on donations ***

There are only 11 days left in this race, and the polls are in a virtual tie. Katie is fighting for working families in PA -- but we're up against major special interest spending. Can you make a grassroots donation today to help Katie win this race and take back the Senate?
**Chip in $5 today. Thank you.**

**[Donate Now](https://act.myngp.com/el/-528091990257041408/-6752839777986281472?refcode=e20161028.2&refcode2=e20161028.2nd&amount=25)**

name: MaggieHassan.com
subject: 100% serious - I don't want to lose
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdcb8/2a380d31/1762477f/fff2af/1933716320/VEsH/ "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdcb8/2a380d31/1762477f/fff2af/1933716320/VEsE/ "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdcb8/2a380d31/1762477f/fff2a8/1933716320/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoibGFzdC1tYXRjaCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZTIwMTYxMDI4X05vdjlNYXRjaF9uaC1uZCIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiIzLDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAsNTAwIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/last-match?refcode=e20161028_Nov9Match_nh-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500")
Look, everyone. The election is just 11 days away and recent polls show that **if the election were held today, we would LOSE.**
I don't want to wake up on November 9 to find that we've lost here in New Hampshire, and that Washington Republicans still control the Senate and are slated to confirm our next Supreme Court justices.
[**Donate before tonight's deadline and your gift could be DOUBLED in the fight to elect Governor Hassan to the Senate, win back the majority, and secure the future of the Supreme Court.**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdcb8/2a380d31/1762477f/fff2a8/1933716320/VEsC/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoibGFzdC1tYXRjaCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZTIwMTYxMDI4X05vdjlNYXRjaF9uaC1uZCIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiIzLDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAsNTAwIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/last-match?refcode=e20161028_Nov9Match_nh-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500")

Did you see our email from yesterday? We saw the poll - and so did the media. We're within just 4 points of Jay Inslee and 12% of Washingtonians still haven't made up their mind on who they're voting for in the race for governor.

name: Rep. John Lewis
subject: North Carolina needs Deborah
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Deborah Ross for Senate Deborah Ross for Senate
body:
| |
---
| |
---
| I joined the civil rights movement over 50 years ago to fight for equality and against injustice. I marched with Dr. King and participated in sit-ins like the one in Greensboro, and I witnessed our hard-fought efforts gradually transform into progress.

**I can tell you that now, even half a century later, our work is not over.** Today, Donald Trump and other members of the Republican Party are working to erase that progress. Their hateful rhetoric and support for voter suppression makes this perfectly clear.

[_**That 's why we need leaders like Deborah who will stand up and speak out against injustice. Join me and help her win North Carolina's Senate seat by giving $5 or $10 to her campaign.**_](https://secure.deborahross.com/page/m/45f427be/2cc31c44/4a6e702/19f9bf04/3860362907/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dre161028?refcode=dre161028_m&recur_weekly=true&amount=5")

Deborah believes our right to vote is sacred and she's worked tirelessly to safeguard it. In the North Carolina legislature, Deborah's bill allowed for same-day registration during early voting. **And after a court struck down North Carolina 's discriminatory voting restrictions, this was one of the provisions that was restored.**

When North Carolina passed HB2, a law that infringed on the civil rights of LGBT Americans and inflicted tremendous economic losses on the state, Deborah spoke out against it while her opponent remained silent for months.

If Deborah wins, North Carolina will gain a Senator who can ensure North Carolina's future is marked by equal opportunity, and Democrats could regain control of the Senate majority.

_**[We need to make sure Deborah's Senate bid is successful. Her race is tied up right now, and special interest groups are pouring money into this race to help her opponent. Make sure she can fight back -- give $5 or $10.](https://secure.deborahross.com/page/m/45f427be/2cc31c44/4a6e702/19f9bf04/3860362907/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dre161028?refcode=dre161028_m&recur_weekly=true&amount=5")**_

I've spent my life fighting for equality. Today I'm working to build a Congress that fights for the same thing. And Deborah needs to be a part of that Congress.

Thank you for helping her out today,

Rep. John Lewis |
Paid for by Deborah Ross for Senate Deborah Ross for Senate
P.O. Box 28258
Raleigh NC 27611 United States This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)
[Click here](https://secure.deborahross.com/page/m/45f427be/2cc31c44/4a6e702/19f9bf0b/3860362907/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "http://www.deborahross.com/subscriptions/?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com") to unsubscribe

name: Cory Booker
subject: I want Russ in the Senate
disclaimer_text: paid for by Russ for Wisconsin, Joe Sensenbrenner, Madison, WI, Treasurer
body:
We have a historic opportunity to flip the Senate, and that starts in Wisconsin. | [](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf464e/1c469400/1ee64e4/3542f04/1505161701/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/oct-eom?utm_source=ema_2016-10-28_oct_eom5_nd&refcode=ema_2016-10-28_oct_eom5_nd&utm_campaign=oct_eom5&utm_medium=ema") Friend, A few months ago, I stood on the stage at the Democratic National Convention and looked out at the crowd -- what I saw was nothing short of inspiring. People from all walks of life had united for one simple reason: to celebrate our shared values. I felt a sense of urgency, like I do now, that we must win in November -- and win big. Just yesterday, I campaigned in Wisconsin with my friend, Russ Feingold. I'm proud to stand with Russ -- a true progressive champion on civil rights, foreign policy, and security for middle-class and working families -- and look forward to fighting side-by-side in the Senate to advance the progressive values we share. **[But Russ can't win without your help, friend. In just three days, Russ is closing the books on his final end-of-month goal of this campaign. Will you donate $5 to make sure he reaches his goal?](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf464e/1c469400/1ee64e4/3542f04/1505161701/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/oct-eom?utm_source=ema_2016-10-28_oct_eom5_nd&refcode=ema_2016-10-28_oct_eom5_nd&utm_campaign=oct_eom5&utm_medium=ema")** [](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf464e/1c469400/1ee64e4/3542f04/1505161701/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/oct-eom?utm_source=ema_2016-10-28_oct_eom5_nd&refcode=ema_2016-10-28_oct_eom5_nd&utm_campaign=oct_eom5&utm_medium=ema") _Or, if your payment information is saved with ActBlue, click below and your contribution will go through immediately:_ | | [$5 »](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf464e/1c469400/1ee64e4/3542f05/1505161701/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/oct-eom?utm_source=ema_2016-10-28_oct_eom5_nd&refcode=ema_2016-10-28_oct_eom5_nd&utm_campaign=oct_eom5&utm_medium=ema&express_lane=true&amount=5")
---
| | [$25 »](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf464e/1c469400/1ee64e4/3542f02/1505161701/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/oct-eom?utm_source=ema_2016-10-28_oct_eom5_nd&refcode=ema_2016-10-28_oct_eom5_nd&utm_campaign=oct_eom5&utm_medium=ema&express_lane=true&amount=25")
---
| [$100 »](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf464e/1c469400/1ee64e4/3542f03/1505161701/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/oct-eom?utm_source=ema_2016-10-28_oct_eom5_nd&refcode=ema_2016-10-28_oct_eom5_nd&utm_campaign=oct_eom5&utm_medium=ema&express_lane=true&amount=100")
---
| | [Other »](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf464e/1c469400/1ee64e4/3542f00/1505161701/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/oct-eom?utm_source=ema_2016-10-28_oct_eom5_nd&refcode=ema_2016-10-28_oct_eom5_nd&utm_campaign=oct_eom5&utm_medium=ema&express_lane_other")
---
Russ's energy when it comes to how he can help people is truly extraordinary. When he sees a challenge, he doesn't toe the party line, nor does he listen to special interest groups -- he rises to meet it. He listens to the hardworking people of Wisconsin, and he does right by them.
That's how you lead.
This is a critical time in our nation's history. In 11 short days, we are going to make a big decision about who we are as a nation. We have a historic opportunity to flip the Senate and put it back in the hands of Democrats.
**[Donate $5 to his campaign today to make sure he reaches his final end-of-month goal of this campaign.](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf464e/1c469400/1ee64e4/3542f04/1505161701/VEsO/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/oct-eom?utm_source=ema_2016-10-28_oct_eom5_nd&refcode=ema_2016-10-28_oct_eom5_nd&utm_campaign=oct_eom5&utm_medium=ema")**
Don't give up, and please don't sit this out. Join me in working harder than ever to elect progressives like my friend, Russ.
Thanks,
Cory Booker
[CONTRIBUTE »](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf464e/1c469400/1ee64e4/3542f04/1505161701/VEsP/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/oct-eom?utm_source=ema_2016-10-28_oct_eom5_nd&refcode=ema_2016-10-28_oct_eom5_nd&utm_campaign=oct_eom5&utm_medium=ema")

name: Newt Gingrich
subject: what we must do
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
Peter,

This is a serious matter: **we only have 11 days until Election Day. **

Republicans are facing an onslaught of attacks from Senate Democrats, liberal super PACs, and the Clinton Campaign Machine.

See for yourself below:****
_Harry Reid 's Senate Majority PAC is launching a **$10 million dollar attack ad blitz** in Pennsylvania, according to the Pittsburgh Post-Gazette

A liberal super PAC called End Citizens United has spent **nearly $2 million** promoting liberal Democrat Senate candidate in Missouri, according to USA Today

Hillary Clinton's own campaign announced they will spend **$6 MILLION** dollars to help Democrats seize the Senate, launching ads and get-out-the-vote efforts in Ohio, Pennsylvania, Florida, New Hampshire, Iowa, and North Carolina_
---
This is ONLY a small sampling of the hundreds of liberal super PACs that are spending BIG to help Democrats SEIZE the Senate.

**Peter, we cannot win if we are outspent 8-to-1.** _We need reinforcements, FAST._

**Help us defend our conservative Senate majority:

[Pitch in $25 immediately >>>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/38423575:sjqa-YuNZ:m:1:1320601823:64C7F676EC3C241B7CD58B847C5B0367:r)

[Pitch in $50 immediately >>>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/38423576:sjqa-YuNZ:m:1:1320601823:64C7F676EC3C241B7CD58B847C5B0367:r)

[Pitch in $100 immediately >>>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/38423577:sjqa-YuNZ:m:1:1320601823:64C7F676EC3C241B7CD58B847C5B0367:r)

[Pitch in $200 immediately >>>>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/38423578:sjqa-YuNZ:m:1:1320601823:64C7F676EC3C241B7CD58B847C5B0367:r)**

OR

subject: Just 4 days
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J
body:
Please stand with me now in this fight to take our country back. |

Friend, We are down to the last four days of October -- and Election Day is now just 11 days away. This is our last End of Month Fundraising Deadline -- and obviously the most important of the campaign -- because we’re running out of time to secure resources that can actually be put into the fight before November 8th. Friend, our tremendous movement to Make America Great Again needs to make one more huge push to ensure our final days’ voter outreach and all-important Get-Out-the Vote ground game are absolutely as effective as possible -- and I need you to be at the center of that push NOW. We must make tremendous progress by midnight October 31st -- that’s why I’m calling for a huge $20 Million October End of Month Fundraising Drive today, and asking you to make an immediate contribution of $25, $50, $75, $100 or even more to help us make it happen. Friend, I’ll even go a step further -- I’ll put in $10 million of my own funds -- so I’m asking patriotic Americans to step up and help Team Trump with a contribution at this critical time. Crooked Hillary and her corrupt media cheerleaders are going to attack me with more ferocity than ever this last week and a half -- and we can’t let their negativity and lies eat into Trump supporter turnout -- we’ve got to fight back. So please stand with me now in this fight to take our country back -- make an immediate “4 Days -- $20 Million” October End of Month contribution today. Sincerely, Donald J. Trump P.S. Friend, we can’t look back and wish we’d done more -- we must stay focused and finish this fight with a final push that will knock Crooked Hillary out and bring us a tremendous, historic victory. We’ve only got four days to raise $20 million -- will you help with your urgent October End of Month gift now? Thanks again, Donald. CONTRIBUTE $100

name: Donald J. Trump
subject: I'm truly proud
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J
body:
This is how I'm showing my commitment to our movement. |
[](http://trk.listelixr.net/c/4/?T=OTkyNjA2OTc%3AMDItYjE2MzAyLWIyYmFmZjQ0MDMyZDRjOWViZTMzYjFiMmIyMWU3OWQ1%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AMjgyNTQ5Mjg%3AZmFsc2U%3AMA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9kb25hdGUuZG9uYWxkanRydW1wLmNvbS9vY3RvYmVyLWVuZC1vZi1tb250aC1nb2FsLz91dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1KRkNfZGlyZWN0LWFza19vY3QtZW9tJmFkZGl0aW9uYWxbdXRtX2NvbnRlbnRdPUNDLUxZLTEwMjgxNi1vY3QtZW9tLXZvbm5pZS1kanQtaW5oLWpmYy1wcyZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXBfQ0NfTFk&K=zU51ZgZSa5T2yKKbuZuv-Q)

Friend,

I want to show you this message from one of our strongest donors:

_I have never donated to any presidential campaign. I only work part time so that I can be home for my daughter and be off when she needs me so I can only donate a small amount but I believe enough in Mr. Trump 's policies that I have sacrificed a few things just to be able to donate the little that I could._

-Vonnie T., a hard-working patriot from Florida

Vonnie might think she only gave "a little." But her $6 contribution was a BIG sacrifice for our country. Thanks to Vonnie and millions of patriots just like her, we've collectively raised hundreds of millions of dollars and set an __**all-time**__ record for Republican fundraising.

And her tremendous sacrifice is what inspired me to do something HUGE!

**I’m transferring an UNPRECEDENTED TEN MILLION DOLLARS TO OUR CAMPAIGN.**

But I need YOU to join me before our end-of-month deadline. Please make a contribution toward our FINAL goal.

I only work part time so that I can be home for my daughter and be off when she needs me so I can only donate a small amount but I believe enough in Mr. Trump 's policies that I have sacrificed a few things just to be able to donate the little that I could. -Vonnie T., a hard-working patriot from Florida Vonnie might think she only gave "a little." But her $6 contribution was a BIG sacrifice for our country. Thanks to Vonnie and millions of patriots just like her, we've collectively raised hundreds of millions of dollars and set an all-time record for Republican fundraising. And her tremendous sacrifice is what inspired me to do something HUGE! I’m transferring an UNPRECEDENTED TEN MILLION DOLLARS TO OUR CAMPAIGN. But I need YOU to join me before our end-of-month deadline. Please make a contribution toward our FINAL goal. Hillary might have the special interests and millionaire lobbyists on her side, but we have something far more powerful: THE AMERICAN PEOPLE. subject: The future
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greitens for Missouri, Jeff Stuerman, Treasurer
body:
Peter,

This election is about the future.

I know that families just like ours all over the state just want their kids to grow up with safer streets and better schools. That's what we're fighting for every day.

**[Watch our new ad here](http://ericgreitens.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c81357bdb59fb170d9eb82b3a&id=937356215f&e=84041254e6)** making the case for a better Missouri.
[](http://ericgreitens.us13.list-manage1.com/track/click?u=c81357bdb59fb170d9eb82b3a&id=82aad8d6be&e=84041254e6)
Together, we can take Missouri in a new direction.

On to Victory,
Eric Greitens
Paid for by Greitens for Missouri, Jeff Stuerman, Treasurer
4579 Laclede Avenue #138
St. Louis, Missouri 63108
Eric is a former member of the United States Navy having served four deployments overseas. Use of his military rank, titles and photographs in uniform does not imply an endorsement from the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.
This email was sent to dpwillis67+greitens@gmail.com. You can also follow us on [Facebook](http://ericgreitens.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c81357bdb59fb170d9eb82b3a&id=61b44b4c8c&e=84041254e6) and [Twitter](http://ericgreitens.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c81357bdb59fb170d9eb82b3a&id=3638930d55&e=84041254e6). Emails are one of the best ways to stay connected with the campaign. If they become too much, you can [unsubscribe](http://ericgreitens.us13.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=c81357bdb59fb170d9eb82b3a&id=3f71c40094&e=84041254e6&c=c3777dc0b2), but please let us know how we can improve. You can always reach us at [team@ericgreitens.com](mailto:team@ericgreitens.com) or (314) 899-0288. You're still reading the fineprint? You must be a detail oriented, all-around awesome person who is a big supporter — you should [volunteer](http://ericgreitens.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c81357bdb59fb170d9eb82b3a&id=11531f8a10&e=84041254e6) with us!

name: James Carville
subject: a nightmare for Democrats
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC, dscc
body:
Wish I could say we had this election wrapped up, but that's simply not the case. If we don't step up before Monday's deadline, Trump's nightmare will become our reality. [](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dsccab4w?refcode=DPE-20161028-Carville-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")
---
There's nothing better than Halloween, Friend -- the costumes, candy, and jumping out of the bushes to spook the neighborhood kids (they deserved it after smashing our pumpkin!).

But what REALLY keeps me up at night is the possibility that we fall short of our last fundraising deadline -- our final chance to show our strength before the election. And if we do, **Trump 's nightmarish rhetoric becomes our reality.**

[**This isn 't a trick and it wouldn't be a treat. That's why I need you to pitch in a TRIPLE-MATCHED gift before the end-of-month deadline to help the DSCC defeat Trump's clowns in the Senate.**](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dsccab4w?refcode=DPE-20161028-Carville-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")

The GOP has embraced Halloween like never before -- they want to carve up Social Security, make Planned Parenthood disappear, and treat the Supreme Court like a joke.

**I wish I could say we had this election wrapped up, but polls and dark money tell a different story.** So I won't sugarcoat it: With the most important deadline before Election Day on Monday, Democrats can't run a single dollar behind. Republicans are all-in on their Senate candidates -- and we've gotta be too.

**It doesn 't get scarier than falling short on Election Day. Friend, will you pitch in before the deadline so Democrats can take back the Senate? Your gift will be TRIPLE-MATCHED. **

name: Bernie Sanders
subject: We must focus now on Russ Feingold
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Bernie Sanders
body:
#
Sisters and Brothers,
All across our country, as a result of the disastrous Supreme Court decision on Citizens United, billionaires are trying to buy elections for candidates who will represent the wealthy and the powerful.
There is no better example of this than in Wisconsin, where big money interests are spending millions to defeat progressive champion Russ Feingold. Russ, throughout his career, has led the effort for campaign finance reform, civil rights, the protection of our privacy and the needs of working people. He opposed the war in Iraq, led the effort against the Patriot Act and wants to see that the wealthy and large corporations pay their fair share of taxes.
It should be no surprise, therefore, that the Koch Brothers and the billionaire class want to keep Russ out of the Senate. The problem is, **they're spending so much money in Wisconsin's Senate race that Russ could lose.**
The billionaire class has already spent $7.5 million in outside spending to defeat Russ. He's seen his lead in the polls cut by more than half.
In my mind, this is exactly the kind of grotesque spending by millionaires and billionaires which is moving our country toward an oligarchic form of society. We need to overturn Citizens United, we need real campaign finance reform, and we need a progressive Senate.
**We need to help Russ Feingold win his election, and that means all of us need to stand together right now to support Russ.**
[**Please rush a $3 contribution DIRECTLY to Russ Feingold's campaign so that he can take on the billionaires trying to keep him out of the Senate.**](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/russ-feingold?refcode=em161028-full "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/russ-feingold?refcode=em161028-full")
It is absolutely critical for Russ Feingold to win his election if we want to win a majority of seats in the Senate. As you know well, Paul Ryan is terrified of the prospect of losing the Senate.
Just imagine how much Paul Ryan doesn't want to see Senators Bernie Sanders and Russ Feingold working together.
You have already raised nearly $2.5 million to help candidates for the House and Senate since last week. Your contributions are completely changing races for Congress across the country.
Now we must focus our attention directly to support Russ Feingold. His race is critically important, and we need people to stand together to take on billionaires trying to buy this election.
[**Rush a $3 contribution directly to Russ Feingold's campaign so he can help take a majority in the Senate.**](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/russ-feingold?refcode=em161028-full "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/russ-feingold?refcode=em161028-full")
Thank you for all you are doing in the fight for a progressive America.
In solidarity,
Bernie Sanders
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/russ-feingold?refcode=em161028-full "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/russ-feingold?refcode=em161028-full")**

Paid for by Friends of Bernie Sanders
PO BOX 391, Burlington, VT 05402
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=22123 "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=22123"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/").

body:
What I’m doing for our supporters |

Friend, I didn’t know any other way to get your attention, but this is an email that you can’t afford to miss. My father is putting $10 million of his own money into the final days of this campaign if you donate today. Why is he doing this? Because he values your support. He knows that with you on board the team, Crooked Hillary won’t be able to beat us. And with less than 2 weeks left until Election Day, we need your support now more than ever to fund our crucial TV ad blitz this upcoming week. Donate $35, $50, or $100 right now to make sure my father wins on Election Day. Friend, too many Americans have suffered under the liberal policies of Barack Obama. And Hillary Clinton is just an extension, an even worse one, of the Obama agenda. She believes we need to keep ObamaCare and make it larger, not repeal it and replace it like my father believes. She thinks you make too much money, therefore you need to pay more in taxes. And the small businesses that create jobs and jump start the local economies? Well, Hillary thinks those small businesses need more regulations. She even told coal miners that she was going to put them out of business. Imagine that Friend, a candidate who takes pride in saying that she is going to put American workers out of a job and into the unemployment line. Is that what we want in our next president? I don’t. And I hope you don’t either. Our country cannot afford Hillary’s job killing policies and her liberal agenda. In just 11 days, this election will be over and that’s why you cannot wait any longer to join this movement to stop her. Donate $35, $50, or $100 right now to stop Hillary’s liberal agenda takeover of our government by electing my father. Thank you, Eric Trump CONTRIBUTE $100

clean_body: What I’m doing for our supporters | Friend, I didn’t know any other way to get your attention, but this is an email that you can’t afford to miss. My father is putting $10 million of his own money into the final days of this campaign if you donate today. Why is he doing this? Because he values your support. He knows that with you on board the team, Crooked Hillary won’t be able to beat us. And with less than 2 weeks left until Election Day, we need your support now more than ever to fund our crucial TV ad blitz this upcoming week. Donate $35, $50, or $100 right now to make sure my father wins on Election Day. Friend, too many Americans have suffered under the liberal policies of Barack Obama. And Hillary Clinton is just an extension, an even worse one, of the Obama agenda. She believes we need to keep ObamaCare and make it larger, not repeal it and replace it like my father believes. She thinks you make too much money, therefore you need to pay more in taxes. And the small businesses that create jobs and jump start the local economies? Well, Hillary thinks those small businesses need more regulations. She even told coal miners that she was going to put them out of business. Imagine that Friend, a candidate who takes pride in saying that she is going to put American workers out of a job and into the unemployment line. Is that what we want in our next president? I don’t. And I hope you don’t either. Our country cannot afford Hillary’s job killing policies and her liberal agenda. In just 11 days, this election will be over and that’s why you cannot wait any longer to join this movement to stop her. Donate $35, $50, or $100 right now to stop Hillary’s liberal agenda takeover of our government by electing my father. Thank you, Eric Trump CONTRIBUTE $100 Contributions to the Trump Make America Great Again Committee are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. Diane Hendricks is one of Wisconsin's biggest right-wing mega-donors. She's given millions to Scott Walker and the Koch network -- and now, Ron Johnson. And she knows a massive influx of cash like this could turn the tide in Johnson's favor.
GOP billionaires like Diane Hendricks use their fortunes to buy politicians like Senator Johnson to do their bidding in Washington. And while they get ahead, middle-class and working families are left behind.
**This isn't how our politics should work. Enough is enough.**
Unlike Ron Johnson and Scott Walker, Russ doesn't have billionaire backers on speed dial. In fact, he's spent his life fighting against massive inequality and corruption in our political system. That's why they can't stand the thought of Russ winning.
[**The bad news is, if we don't hit our FINAL end-of-month goal, we won't stand a chance. Donate $5 right now and help Russ fight back against this massive influx of GOP cash.**](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf4648/1c469400/1d4d819/3542c84/771685919/VEsP/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/oct-eom?utm_source=ema_2016-10-28_eom6_nd&source=ema_2016-10-28_eom6_nd&sc=ema_2016-10-28_eom6_nd&ms=ema_2016-10-28_eom6_nd&refcode=ema_2016-10-28_eom6_nd&utm_campaign=eom6&utm_medium=ema")
With 11 days left of this campaign, there's still so much more work to do. Russ needs us to stand with him and hit our FINAL end-of-month goal. And, with your help, I know we can do it.
Keep fighting,
Michael Tyler

name: Eric Hyers
subject: fake newspaper headlines?!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Steve Bullock - Democrat, P
body:
---
**Gianforte ad misleads about Chronicle reporting**
\-- _Bozeman Daily Chronicle_ , 10/25
Friend,

Greg Gianforte has now spent $5.3 million of his personal fortune to try to buy this election and it's just not working.

**So he 's resorting to attack ads so shameless, his local newspaper had to call him out. [Will you donate $15 to help us fight back?](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=%2FN7gcjPpiVzNQrgvVj7uGvMzlUmGEdC3)**

Let me quickly walk you through the background on this. Greg Gianforte actually allowed his campaign to run an attack ad with a series of _**_fake_ newspaper headlines**_ attributed to the _Chronicle_ \-- falsely trying to convince voters that his flat-out wrong accusations came from recent press reporting.

This is way over the line. It is beyond slimy. And it's not who we are as Montanans.

But Mr. Gianforte is banking on being able to spend millions of his own money so that he's never held accountable. **Help us make sure that we 're able to fully fund our positive, issue-based and _truthful_ ads and [chip in $15.](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=yZxZ9p9uzHefGHuCF5nh6vMzlUmGEdC3)**

Thanks,

Eric Hyers
Campaign Manager ************
---
| [**DONATE**](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=Q5M1Xgxlbt%2BQhmfm3PY3cPMzlUmGEdC3)
---
| Paid for by Friends of Steve Bullock - Democrat, P.O. Box 1330, Helena, MT 59624
---
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
If you no longer wish to receive updates from our campaign, please [unsubscribe](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=Ce2Ieu6jFNp1%2BHu%2BJsGcwPMzlUmGEdC3).

Friends of Steve Bullock
Post Office Box 1330
Helena MT 59624 United States
---

name: Leigh K. Warren, EMILY's List
subject: Final October record >>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by EMILY's List [www
body:
| [ ](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c0b93/24c69fd9/a22fefd/18edeb12/3763777385/VEsH/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/donate-to-emily?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=WPEFEV77N_digital_email_20161028_SRec_n-all&source=WPEFEV77N_digital_email_20161028_SRec_n-all")
---

| | Hi there,

Election Day is rushing toward us, and I'm checking with everyone to make sure we're ready.

Every time I ask the staff here what more we can do, I hear dozens of requests for more resources to finish the job. It's that time of the cycle where every dime counts, everyone's in need of something, and whatever we make available is immediately put to good use.

That's why we need everyone to help as much as they possibly can before October is over.

**[Here's the record we have associated with this email address-- help finish out the cycle strong.](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c0b93/24c69fd9/a22fefd/18edeb13/3763777385/VEsE/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20161028_email_OctoberGoal?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2+-+Heres+the+record+we+have+associated+with&utm_campaign=WPEFEV77N_digital_email_20161028_SRec_n-all&source=WPEFEV77N_digital_email_20161028_SRec_n-all")** **Name:** Unlisted
**Total 2016 cycle donation amount: **Pending
**[Suggested Action: Donate $3](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c0b93/24c69fd9/a22fefd/18edeb0c/3763777385/VEsF/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20161028_email_OctoberGoal?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=3+-+Suggested+Action+Donate+if+consinConsGro&utm_campaign=WPEFEV77N_digital_email_20161028_SRec_n-all&source=WPEFEV77N_digital_email_20161028_SRec_n-all")** We've been giving our candidates the best support we can. But it's crunch time now**,** and they all could benefit from more.

We have the chance to flip the Senate, unseat House Republicans, and elect Hillary Clinton as president. This is our moment, and we can't let it pass us by.

**Donate $3 before October 31st to help elect our incredible candidates up and down the ballot:**

**[https://secure.emilyslist.org/Help-Hit-Octobers-Goal](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c0b93/24c69fd9/a22fefd/18edeb0d/3763777385/VEsC/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20161028_email_OctoberGoal?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=4+-+httpssecureemilyslistorgHelpHitOctobersG&utm_campaign=WPEFEV77N_digital_email_20161028_SRec_n-all&source=WPEFEV77N_digital_email_20161028_SRec_n-all")**

Thank you,

Leigh K. Warren
Chief Administrative Officer, EMILY's List

**[](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c0b93/24c69fd9/a22fefd/18edeb0e/3763777385/VEsD/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20161028_email_OctoberGoal?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=5&utm_campaign=WPEFEV77N_digital_email_20161028_SRec_n-all&source=WPEFEV77N_digital_email_20161028_SRec_n-all")**

\---
If you've donated recently, with a different email address, or offline, thank you! These records may not reflect those additional contributions, but don't worry, we have it recorded.

|
---|---|---
# EMILY's List is a community of over three million members that helps elect pro-choice Democratic women to office.

|
---

subject: 🚨🚨 ELECTION ALERT 🚨🚨
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greitens for Missouri, Jeff Stuerman, Treasurer
body:
Peter,
BREAKING NEWS from the St. Louis Post-Dispatch: We are now TIED with career politician Chris Koster! The momentum is with our campaign with less than two weeks to go. Now we need your help (http://donate.ericgreitens.com/finish-strong?utm_source=Master+List&utm_campaign=ca7e6cf41b-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2016_10_28&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_3f71c40094-ca7e6cf41b-99411629) to continue our surge.

http://donate.ericgreitens.com/finish-strong?utm_source=Master+List&utm_campaign=ca7e6cf41b-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2016_10_28&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_3f71c40094-ca7e6cf41b-99411629

"Republican Eric Greitens has closed the gap (http://donate.ericgreitens.com/finish-strong?utm_source=Master+List&utm_campaign=ca7e6cf41b-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2016_10_28&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_3f71c40094-ca7e6cf41b-99411629) in the race for Missouri governor, pulling into a statistical tie with Democrat Chris Koster less than two weeks out from the Nov. 8 election, according to new Post-Dispatch poll.

The numbers represent a major surge (http://donate.ericgreitens.com/finish-strong?utm_source=Master+List&utm_campaign=ca7e6cf41b-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2016_10_28&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_3f71c40094-ca7e6cf41b-99411629) for Greitens, a former Navy SEAL with no previous electoral experience who has been campaigning as a political outsider."

Invest in Victory (http://donate.ericgreitens.com/finish-strong?utm_source=Master+List&utm_campaign=ca7e6cf41b-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2016_10_28&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_3f71c40094-ca7e6cf41b-99411629) - Donate Today (http://donate.ericgreitens.com/finish-strong?utm_source=Master+List&utm_campaign=ca7e6cf41b-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2016_10_28&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_3f71c40094-ca7e6cf41b-99411629)

Paid for by Greitens for Missouri, Jeff Stuerman, Treasurer

4579 Laclede Avenue #138
St. Louis, Missouri 63108

Eric is a former member of the United States Navy having served four deployments overseas. Use of his military rank, titles and photographs in uniform does not imply an endorsement from the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

This email was sent to dpwillis67+greitens@gmail.com. You can also follow us on Facebook (https://facebook.com/ericgreitens?utm_source=Master+List&utm_campaign=ca7e6cf41b-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2016_10_28&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_3f71c40094-ca7e6cf41b-99411629) and Twitter (https://twitter.com/ericgreitens?utm_source=Master+List&utm_campaign=ca7e6cf41b-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2016_10_28&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_3f71c40094-ca7e6cf41b-99411629) . Emails are one of the best ways to stay connected with the campaign. If they become too much, you can unsubscribe (http://ericgreitens.us13.list-manage2.com/unsubscribe?u=c81357bdb59fb170d9eb82b3a&id=3f71c40094&e=84041254e6&c=ca7e6cf41b) , but please let us know how we can improve. You can always reach us at team@ericgreitens.com (mailto:team@ericgreitens.com) or (314) 899-0288. You're still reading the fineprint? You must be a detail oriented, all-around awesome person who is a big supporter — you should volunteer (http://ericgreitens.com/volunteer?utm_source=Master+List&utm_campaign=ca7e6cf41b-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2016_10_28&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_3f71c40094-ca7e6cf41b-99411629) with us!

name: =?UTF-8?Q?donaldjtrump=2Ecom?=
subject: Help us close strong
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J
body:
It’s now or never – JOIN to help us hit $10 Million Trump Victory Goal. |

Friend, This is big news – Mr. Trump is putting in $10 million of his own money into the campaign, because he is that determined to win and get work for you in Washington. That gets us halfway to what we need to ramp up our final ad blitz and get-out-the-vote efforts and WIN. And that’s where your support comes in. I know you want to see Mr. Trump prevail over the Clinton campaign machine and the lying liberal media. We need you on board for our final end-of-month fundraising push, Friend. JOIN Team Trump to help us hit our $20 Million Trump Victory Goal by midnight on Monday... with your help we’ll close strong and WIN on November 8th. We’re just 11 days from Election Day, and hitting this goal is crucial to our success. The race is tight and we’re fighting to gain the edge in key battlegrounds across the country. We’re counting on supporters like you to get involved IMMEDIATELY. JOIN WITH TRUMP VICTORY GOAL CONTRIBUTION We need Mr. Trump’s bold leadership in the White House, to end the rigged system and Make America Great Again. This is our chance to change our nation’s course and avoid utter disaster – you know that’s what a Hillary Clinton presidency would mean for our country. Our records indicate you’ve shown your support for Mr. Trump, but have not yet contributed financially to the campaign’s success. It’s now or never. Make a $100, $75, $50, $35, $20 or even $10 or $5 Trump Victory Goal contribution, and I’ll add you to the list of new supporters we send to Mr. Trump each morning. Let’s get to work. Let’s make Mr. Trump the next President of the United States on November 8th, so he can get to work for all of us in Washington. Thank you, For America, Brad Parscale, Digital Director P.S. Mr. Trump is putting in $10 million of his own money so we can win big on Election Day. And we’re asking supporters like you to JOIN Team Trump at this critical time, so we can raise $10 million more by the end of the month to close strong and WIN. Make your most generous possible Trump Victory Goal contribution. JOIN WITH TRUMP VICTORY GOAL CONTRIBUTION

Contributions to the Trump Make America Great Again Committee are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.
